---
title: "CV"
include-after-body:
  - assets/career-timeline.html
  - assets/grants-gantt.html
  - assets/service-timeline.html
  - assets/talks-map.html
---

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var btn = document.querySelector('p > .btn-outline-primary');
  var title = document.querySelector('.title');
  if (btn && title) {
    var p = btn.parentNode;
    title.appendChild(btn);
    if (p && !p.textContent.trim()) p.remove();
  }
});
</script>

[Download PDF](assets/short-cv.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

<div id="career-timeline-wrap">
<div id="career-timeline"></div>
<div class="career-legend"><span class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#7888a8"></span>PhD</span><span class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#9088a0"></span>Postdoc</span><span class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#a87080"></span>Lecturer</span><span class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#c07050"></span>Senior Lecturer</span></div>
<div id="career-tooltip" class="career-tooltip">
<div class="ct-title"></div>
<div class="ct-desc"></div>
</div>
</div>

---

## Research Funding

<div id="grants-gantt-wrap">
<div id="grants-gantt"></div>
<div id="grants-tooltip" class="grants-tooltip">
<div class="gt-title"></div>
<div class="gt-funder"></div>
<div class="gt-value"></div>
</div>
</div>

---

## Talks

<div id="talks-map-wrap">
<div id="talks-map"></div>
<div class="talks-controls"><div class="talks-timeline"><input type="range" id="talks-year-slider" class="talks-slider" min="2014" max="2027" value="2027" step="0.5"><span id="talks-year-display" class="talks-year-display">2027</span></div></div>
</div>

---

## Service & Leadership

<div id="service-timeline-wrap">
<div id="service-timeline"></div>
<div id="service-tooltip" class="service-tooltip">
<div class="st-title"></div>
<div class="st-body"></div>
<div class="st-desc"></div>
<div class="st-period"></div>
</div>
</div>

---

## In the Press

<div class="press-cards">
<div class="press-card">
<div class="press-year">2023</div>
<div class="press-outlets"><a href="https://theconversation.com/cicadas-could-hold-the-secret-to-self-cleaning-surfaces-new-study-207435">The Conversation</a> · <a href="https://phys.org/news/2023-07-cicadas-secret-self-cleaning-surfacesnew.html">Phys.org</a> · <a href="https://techxplore.com/news/2023-09-wing-screen-wipers-self-cleaning-cicadas-cleaner.html">TechXplore</a></div>
<div class="press-topic">Cicadas and self-cleaning surfaces</div>
</div>
<div class="press-card">
<div class="press-year">2021</div>
<div class="press-outlets"><a href="https://www.eurekalert.org/news-releases/691043">EurekAlert</a> · <a href="https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2021/02/210225113306.htm">ScienceDaily</a> · <a href="https://phys.org/news/2021-02-tiny-dentists-tools.html">Phys.org</a></div>
<div class="press-topic">Nanobubbles for ultrasonic cleaning</div>
</div>
<div class="press-card">
<div class="press-year">2018</div>
<div class="press-outlets"><a href="https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/uk-scotland-edinburgh-east-fife-45471403">BBC Scotland</a> · <a href="https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2018/09/180910093518.htm">ScienceDaily</a> · <a href="https://phys.org/news/2018-09-power-tiny-vibrations-devices.html">Phys.org</a> · <a href="assets/press/Pillai.Times.11Sep18.pdf">The Times</a> · <a href="assets/press/Pillai.Metro.11Sep18.pdf">Metro</a> · <a href="assets/press/Pillai.Express.11Sep18.pdf">Daily Express</a> · <a href="assets/press/Pillai.Sun.11Sep18.pdf">The Sun</a></div>
<div class="press-topic">Acoustothermal atomization</div>
</div>
</div>
